code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut started = false
      while i < n
        let c = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          started = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
          started = started
        end
        if i == n + 1
          i = n
        else if not started and (c < 48 or c > 57)
          i = n
        end
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13 or c == -1
          i = i
        end
        if not (c >= 48 and c <= 57)
          i = i
        end
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      mut a = signed
      if a < 0
        a = -a
      end
      if not have
        best = signed
        best_abs = a
        have = true
      else if a < best_abs
        best = signed
        best_abs = a
      end
    end
  end

  println("min_abs=#{best}")
end
